name: Research Ethics Review Decision Flowchart with Multiple Terminals
input: Create a flowchart for deciding the level of ethics review needed for a research project. Start: New research project proposed. Decision 1: Does it involve human subjects? If No -> No IRB review needed (Terminal: Exempt). If Yes -> Decision 2: Is it minimal risk? (survey, interview, observation of public behavior, existing de-identified data). If Yes -> Decision 3: Does it involve vulnerable populations? (children, prisoners, pregnant women, cognitively impaired). If Yes -> Full board IRB review required (Terminal: Full Review). If No -> Expedited review pathway (Terminal: Expedited). If not minimal risk (from Decision 2) -> Decision 4: Is it a clinical trial? If Yes -> Decision 5: Phase I/II or Phase III/IV? Phase I/II -> Full board review + DSMB required (Terminal: Full Review + DSMB). Phase III/IV -> Full board review + DSMB + FDA IND required (Terminal: Full Review + DSMB + FDA). If not clinical trial -> Full board review (Terminal: Full Review). Show 5 decision diamonds and 5 terminal states.
qualityCriteria: Flowchart type declared with TD direction
Human subjects decision as first branch
At least 3 distinct terminal states (Exempt, Expedited, Full Review)
DSMB mentioned in clinical trial paths
FDA/IND mentioned for Phase III/IV path
Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: Flowchart TD with 12+ nodes, 5 decision diamonds, 5 terminal states, ethics review decision tree.
